commit.message:
fix(android): prevent spurious beeps during calls by tracking audio focus state

Each requestAudioFocus() call was creating a new listener, causing the
previous listener to receive AUDIOFOCUS_LOSS_TRANSIENT and triggering
3 beeps in Flutter. Added audioFocusGranted flag: if focus is already
held, skip re-requesting (just enforce mode). Real audio interruptions
(phone call, alarm) still trigger the notification.

commit.message:
fix: perspective flip bug + multi-model comparison result

Bug: physical/experience differentials (height_diff_inches, reach_diff_inches,
weight_diff_lbs, age_diff_days, experience_diff, win/loss_streak_diff,
win_rate_diff) were NOT negated during perspective flip in pipeline.py.
The filter `c.startswith('diff_')` missed all 8 columns from differentials.py.
Fixed by changing to `'diff' in c` — catches all differential columns.

Effect: on ~50% of training rows, these features had the wrong sign relative
to the flipped label, corrupting the signal and causing a 17.8% asymmetry gap
at inference. After fix: asymmetry gap = 0.003 (near-exact symmetry).

Multi-model results after fix (30 features, same test split):
  logistic_regression: val_auc=0.6461  test_acc=0.6267  test_auc=0.6599  BEST
  xgboost:             val_auc=0.6435  test_acc=0.6235  test_auc=0.6577
  random_forest:       val_auc=0.6424  test_acc=0.6150  test_auc=0.6597

LR now wins — correcting feature orientation reveals linear signal in physical
and streak differentials that XGBoost doesn't additionally benefit from.
Best model AUC: 0.6450 -> 0.6599 (+1.5%). Best accuracy: 0.615 -> 0.627 (+1.2%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix bufferIsSubstantial to use minBufferChars threshold

Was checking !isEmpty (any content = substantial), now checks
count >= minBufferChars (default 10). This fixes stack click
doing swap instead of pull when buffer has trivial content,
and restoreFromHistory unnecessarily stashing short buffers.

fix(windows): add windowsHide:true to prevent background processes opening new windows

spawnDistillBackground and callDistillModel both spawn child processes
on Windows. Without windowsHide:true, detached node process and shell
invocations create visible console windows, causing a spurious Claude
terminal to pop up when running metame codex.

commit.message:
fix: OOM on H100 80GB — gradient checkpointing + batch_size=1 + expandable_segments

Three root causes of the cppo_step OOM at step 3:

1. batch_size=8 in h100.yaml → 8×16=128 sequences in generation (triggers sequential
   fallback), then 8×4=32 sequences in backward pass (way over 80 GB).
   Fix: batch_size=1 (matches paper default, 1×16=16 in generation, 1×4=4 in update).

2. Gradient checkpointing disabled for single-GPU path.
   Only DDP path had gradient_checkpointing_enable(). Without it, all intermediate
   activations for every layer are kept in memory during backward pass.
   Fix: enable gradient_checkpointing_enable() for non-DDP path too.

3. Memory fragmentation after generation phase frees its KV cache.
   After empty_cache(), 10 GB is technically free but in non-contiguous blocks.
   A contiguous 4.77 GB allocation fails despite enough total free memory.
   Fix: PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True in Colab cells [8]/[9].
   (Safe on Colab H100/A100; banned only on WSL2 due to GPU overcommit.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: dynamic model resolution via Anthropic /v1/models API

app/ai/model_registry.py — resolve_models() fetches available model IDs
at startup, picks the lexicographically latest per tier (fast/standard/deep).
get_model(tier) reads from the resolved cache with a three-level fallback:
  1. API result (auto-updated on each deploy)
  2. Env var: AI_FAST_MODEL / AI_STANDARD_MODEL / AI_DEEP_MODEL
  3. Hardcoded defaults (same as config defaults)

ModelRouter._tier_to_model() now delegates to get_model() instead of
reading settings directly — no other callers change.

app/main.py startup calls await resolve_models(settings.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
before the scheduler starts. Failure is logged and silently swallowed so
the app always starts even if the API is temporarily unreachable.

5 tests in tests/ai/test_model_registry.py:
  - API 500 → fallback to config (the spec-required test)
  - API success → picks latest date suffix per tier
  - Missing API key → no HTTP call, config fallback
  - get_model() before resolve → non-empty string
  - ModelRouter uses registry values after successful resolve

autouse fixture resets module cache between tests to prevent bleed
into test_ai_router.py.

189 tests passing total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: alert generation MVP with 3 alert types (#20) (#313)

* feat: add alert generation MVP with 3 alert types (#20)

Add append-only alert system that runs as 4th pipeline phase after
aggregation. Three MVP alert types:

1. velocity_spike — >30% increase in active postings vs 30-day avg
2. new_brand — first-time brand appears at a company (last 7 days)
3. brand_lost — brand with 30+ day history drops to zero active

Implementation:
- Alert model in db/models.py with JSONB metadata
- Alert generation job in aggregation/alerts.py (3 SQL detectors)
- GET /api/v1/alerts endpoint with company_id and alert_type filters
- Pipeline integration in scheduler/jobs.py (runs after aggregation)
- Migration with NULLS NOT DISTINCT unique index for dedup

Closes #20

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(ops): add SIGTERM graceful shutdown with pipeline awareness (#291)

- Register SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers in lifespan that set a global
  shutdown_event and stop active scrape pipeline runs
- Add shutdown checks in enrichment Pass 1/Pass 2 batch loops
- Add shutdown checks between pipeline phases in scheduler jobs
- Expose pipeline status and shutdown state in /health endpoint
- Health returns 503 with status "shutting_down" when draining

The health endpoint now includes:
- pipeline: "idle" | "active (N run(s))" — for deploy safety (#292)
- shutdown: "in_progress" — when SIGTERM received

Closes #291

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(ops): add pre-deploy pipeline check to CD script (#292)

Before restarting services, the deploy script now polls the /health
endpoint for pipeline status. If a pipeline is active, it waits up
to 10 minutes (polling every 15s) before proceeding. After timeout,
deploys anyway with a warning.

This prevents mid-pipeline restarts that would lose in-progress
scrape/enrichment work.

Closes #292

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING to alert inserts for dedup safety (Cursor, Cubic P1)
- Extract _insert_alerts helper using pg_insert with conflict handling
- Add latest_date CTE to velocity spike SQL to avoid repeated MAX(date) subqueries (Gemini)
- Add Alert.id as ORDER BY tie-breaker for deterministic pagination (Cubic P2)
- Track alert generation failures in pipeline success status (Cubic P2)
- Update scheduler tests to mock generate_alerts for the new alerts phase

- Route all direct saveMetadata() calls through scheduleMetadataSave() debounce (except destructor)

commit.message:
Fix user menu dropdown: separate desktop/mobile refs, use render function

The user menu dropdown had two issues:
1. UserButton was defined as an inline component inside Header, causing
   React to unmount/remount the entire subtree on every re-render
   (new function reference = different component type).
2. A single userMenuRef was shared by both desktop and mobile wrappers,
   with mobile always overwriting the desktop ref — breaking outside-click
   detection on desktop and causing instability on mobile.

Fix: split into userMenuRefDesktop + userMenuRefMobile, convert UserButton
from <Component /> syntax to renderUserButton() function call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Section items animate in staggered on open (menuItemIn keyframe)
- Body scroll locked while drawer is open

Join page:
- On successful submit: white overlay floods in (overlayIn 0.28s)
- "You're in the queue" label slides up (subtleUp 0.45s delay)
- HOST wordmark stamps in with spring bounce (logoStamp cubic-bezier)
- Personalised foot note: "We'll text you" if phone given, else "Check back anytime"
- Whole overlay fades out just before router.push fires at 1050ms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: restructure tokens for Tokens Studio compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

SessionStart only, remove UserPromptSubmit, add detailed logging

- Only use SessionStart hook (no more blocking every message)
- Log everything to ~/.claude/rolling-context-hook.log for debugging
- Background process also logs to same file with [bg] prefix
- Non-blocking: fire-and-forget proxy start

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: claude-rolling-context
repository.description: Rolling context compression for Claude Code — never hit the context wall. Auto-compresses old messages while keeping recent context verbatim. Zero config, zero latency. Works as a Claude Code plugin.

commit.message:
feat: controller-side analysis runner and path mappings

Move HDR detect, scene scanning, and audio encoding from agent-side
dispatch to direct ffprobe/ffmpeg execution on the controller host.
Adds a path-mappings system (DB table, REST CRUD API, config bootstrap)
to translate Windows UNC paths to Linux NFS mount paths so the
controller can access NAS source files directly.

- internal/controller/analysis: new Runner with RunHDRDetect,
  RunAnalysis (stream info + scene detect), and RunAudio (FLAC/Opus/AAC)
- internal/controller/engine: AnalysisRunner interface + SetAnalysisRunner;
  expandJob routes hdr_detect/analysis/audio to controller when runner set
- internal/controller/api: five /api/v1/path-mappings CRUD endpoints
- internal/controller/cli: bootstrapPathMappings seeds DB from config
- internal/db: PathMapping model, Store methods, migration 013
- ARCHITECTURE.md: §3.1.3a documents the new subsystem
- configs/controller.yaml.example: new analysis: section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 新增 Claude Code Skills 推薦清單筆記

- 三層架構：官方必裝 → 進階實用 → 核心推薦
- 包含 13 個 Skills 的完整 GitHub 連結
- 重點：Skill Creator 和 Superpowers
